untranslatable_reason: Broadening Wedge pattern detection requires visual identification of diverging trend lines (top and bottom), pattern structure analysis, and throwback confirmation—none of which can be expressed using point-in-time indicators. The signal references specific chart pattern geometry that is not available in the allowed indicator set. Pattern recognition would require custom pattern detection logic or machine learning classification outside the scope of this rules engine.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian channels for breakout detection and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the core broadening wedge formation requirement. The author provides no quantitative exit conditions (AUTHOR_SILENT), so a reasonable reversal (close below the middle band) was substituted. The 5% failure threshold mentioned in parameters was applied as stop_loss_pct.
